name: Hacker News
description: Browse front page, read comments, and discover trending tech content on Hacker News

user_stories.i_want: to browse the front page and see what's trending
user_stories.so_that: I stay informed on the latest tech news and discussions

user_stories.i_want: to open a story and read its top comments
user_stories.so_that: I can understand the community's perspective on a topic

user_stories.i_want: to check the newest submissions before they hit the front page
user_stories.so_that: I discover interesting content before everyone else
